reviews.comment:
Excelente sitio para desconectarse de la ciudad, por unas horas o por varios días si se decide acampar​. La arboleda te restaura los sentidos.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent place to get away from the city, for a few hours or for several days if you decide to camp. The grove restores your senses.
